items.briefing:
A data breach affecting Canvas, a widely used learning management platform, is raising concerns for the education sector globally — including Australian registered training organisations that rely on similar tools to deliver and manage training. This is a timely reminder that platforms holding student data can be targets, and it's worth checking what data your organisation stores in cloud-based learning systems and who has access to it.

Separately, a new report highlights that AI is increasingly fuelling workplace disputes in Australia, signalling that staff are encountering AI-related issues in their day-to-day roles. **Practical tip:** Review what student and staff data is stored in your learning platforms and ensure access is limited to only those who genuinely need it.

featured.title: Canvas breach puts global education cyber risk in focus
featured.quote: Canvas breach exposes hundreds of millions of student records, disrupting Australian university exam systems.
